zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucia Schumacher於1520年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根時，她的父親Andreas Hans Schuhmacher31歲，母親Katharina Ziegler30歲。她於1540年與Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年3月3日在她的家鄉享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Schumacher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Bernd, Klaus, Alois, Erwin, Fritz, Horst, Juergen, Bernhard, Ewald.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a shoemaker, from Middle High German schuoch ‘shoe’, German Schuh + an agent derivative of machen ‘to make’. This surname is also found in Denmark and Sweden.

variants.name: Schuhmacher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Inge, Juergen.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schumacher  .

variants.name: Shumake
meanings: Altered form of German Schumach, a variant of Schumacher .

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia Schumacher was born in 1520, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Andreas Hans Schuhmacher, was 31 and her mother, Katharina Ziegler, was 30. She married Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff in 1540, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 March 1584, in her hometown, at the age of 64.

Elle a épousé Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff en 1540, à Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 mars 1584, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

Sie hat 1540 in Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. ko.lifeSummary: Lucia Schumacher(이)가 1520년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트 oh링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andreas Hans Schuhmacher(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharina Ziegler(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1540년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트 oh링에서 Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 3월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucia Schumacher nasceu em 1520, em Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Andreas Hans Schuhmacher, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katharina Ziegler, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff em 1540, em Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucia Schumacher родилась в 1520 г. в местности мoхринген, обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Andreas Hans Schuhmacher было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katharina Ziegler, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff в 1540 г. в местности мoхринген, обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 марта 1584 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

Se casó con Georg Adam Gottlieb Wolff en 1540, en Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
